rationale: The citing paper explicitly frames its contribution as isolating timbral sound quality versus prior auditory-parameter work (noting earlier emphasis on pitch), and the cited paper is a core marketing study showing pitch-based cross-modal effects on product perceptions. Given this clear conceptual linkage and exact DOI match (10.1509/jmr.14.0300), the citation is plausibly foundational/theory-setting rather than an obvious incidental mention.
